title: Potion Fruit
description: A small mod that let's you pour potions on fruit.. and similar foods.
body:
![Example craft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18d0dd944b9188602883dbfa95bc61c4383f6e02.png)

This is a micro mod, so there isn't much to say. This mod lets you pour potions on fruit, then eat the fruit. Potions taste good, so you can eat potion fruit quickly (even if you're full). Max stack size isn't affected. You can pour multiple potions on one fruit. 

This mod uses a datapack compatible recipe system, and optionally adds an enchantment glint and a tooltip (to keep track of your doctored fruit). It's fully JEI compatible, but, like similar vanilla recipes, won't appear in the recipe book.

Must be installed on both client and server.

Warning: Negative effects can be applied, and (even with advanced tooltips) there will be no visible difference between doctored fruit and regular fruit. Disable glint/lore entries at your own peril.

Warning: A potion recipe can be added for any item, even things that can't normally be eaten...

Have fun trolling your friends (or not, your call).
